functional_requirements.description: Patient can register and create a profile
Patient can search for doctors by specialization
Patient can book cancel and reschedule appointments
Doctor can view and manage their appointment schedule
Doctor can access patient medical history during consultation
System sends appointment reminders via SMS and email
Admin can manage doctors departments and schedules
System generates reports on appointment statistics
Patient can make online payment for consultation fees
System manages prescription records and medical documents

non_functional_requirements.target: HIPAA compliant data protection for patient records
